rent.notes: Florida residential rent exempt from sales tax since June 2023 (was previously taxed at 5. Water, sewage, and trash are separate utility bills (not included in rent).
rent.gigInternetNotes: VERY LIMITED: Only 5.1% fiber availability in Punta Gorda per BroadbandNow (Dec 2024 FCC data). CenturyLink fiber reaches 11% of homes, Comcast fiber just 3%. Most homes limited to cable (92.6% Comcast) or DSL. Finding a 2BR house with verified gigabit is a major constraint; expect significant premium and very limited choices.

electricity.notes: FPL (Florida Power & Light). A/C runs 8+ months. Among highest US electricity costs. All-electric homes common.

gas.notes: Most FL homes all-electric. Propane for some cooking/grills only.

water.notes: Municipal water utility. Tiered rates; lawn irrigation can spike bills.

sewage.notes: Billed with water. Florida municipal wastewater charges.

trash.notes: County solid waste collection. Billed monthly or quarterly.

utilities.taxes: Florida: no sales tax on residential water/sewer. Electricity has gross receipts tax (~2.5%) built into rate.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig).

healthcare.notes: Medicare Part B ($174.70/mo) + Medigap Plan G (~$200/mo x2 people) + Part D (~$45/mo x2) + dental/vision plans. Higher premiums reflect macular degeneration specialist coverage and frequent monitoring needs.

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week, large breed rate (~$44/day). Camp Bow Wow, Dogtopia locations across FL. Prices rising with demand.

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: T-Mobile 55+ Essentials. 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Anti-VEGF injections for macular degeneration (~$300-400 OOP each, 6-10x/yr after Medicare 80%). Specialist visits: ophthalmologist q6-8wks, endocrinologist 2-4x/yr, cardiologist 1-2x/yr. Frequent labs: lipid panel, TSH, A1C, CMP 3-4x/yr each. Both adults: PCP visits quarterly.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.
No state income tax. Federal only.
